title: 律政司未能出席加拿大國慶宴會全場歡呼

replies.msg:
本來鄭若樺今晚要去加拿大國慶宴會，主持講完： " Owing to unforseen circumstances, Ms Teresa Cheng the Secretary for Justice is unable to join us this evening" 後，之後全場歡呼


去片：https://twitter.com/HongKongFP/status/1144196368224755712?s=09

Owing to "unforseen circumstances," #HongKong's justice chief Teresa Cheng did not attend a scheduled Canada Day event on Thur, hours after her office was besieged by hundreds of #notochinaextradition protesters.

Justice Dept. staff were sent home during the afternoon. https://t.co/jvrnOY1bJA
